name: libany-uri-escape-perl
title: libany-uri-escape-perl
summary: module to load URI::Escape::XS preferentially over URI::Escape
description:
module to load URI::Escape::XS preferentially over URI::Escape
URI::Escape is great, but URI::Escape::XS is faster. Any::URI::Escape loads
URI::Escape::XS and imports the two most common methods if XS is installed.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libany-uri-escape-perl because module to load URI::Escape::XS preferentially over URI::Escape.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libany-uri-escape-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libany-uri-escape-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libany-uri-escape-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
